message:
feat(web): prefetch adjacent phages for instant navigation

Add prefetchAround() call after loading a phage to preload
N-2 to N+2 adjacent phage data into cache. This makes
prev/next navigation feel instant by warming the cache.

The prefetchAround method was already implemented in
SqlJsRepository but not being called from the web App.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"phage_explorer-5b5","content_hash":"dc12f26d8fe823a9b9c469689a28b46077a697fe55f47ec06238a2ca5bd71bde","title":"Foundation: Advanced UI State Management","description":"## Advanced UI State Management

Zustand state structure supporting overlay/modal/simulation/command systems.

### AdvancedUIState Interface
```typescript
interface AdvancedUIState {
  // Overlay system
  activeOverlays: Set<OverlayId>;
  overlayConfigs: Map<OverlayId, OverlayConfig>;

  // Modal system
  activeModal: ModalId | null;
  modalHistory: ModalId[];  // For back navigation

  // Simulation state
  activeSimulation: SimulationId | null;
  simulationState: SimState | null;
  simulationSpeed: number;
  simulationPaused: boolean;

  // Command palette
  commandPaletteOpen: boolean;
  commandSearch: string;
  commandResults: CommandMatch[];
  selectedCommandIndex: number;

  // Computed data cache
  analysisCache: Map<string, AnalysisResult>;
}
```

### Key Principle
Precompute on phage selection, not on feature activation. When user selects a phage, background-compute: GC skew, complexity, bendability, promoter predictions. Makes overlays feel instant when toggled.

Depends on: All 4 foundation systems (Overlay, Menu, Command Palette, Simulation)","notes":"Advanced UI state implemented: overlay stack, menu/simulation hubs, command palette state, precompute overlays on phage load, comparison + simulation state tracked in store","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-06T23:35:36.359231-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-07T13:23:18.530353-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-07T13:23:18.530363-05:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-5b5","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-2g5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-06T23:35:36.360877-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-5b5","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-54g","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-06T23:35:36.361949-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-5b5","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-8lh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-06T23:35:36.362786-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-5b5","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-ojb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-06T23:35:36.363707-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"phage_explorer-5jr","content_hash":"c85c0689cfd714338219c99ff10fd33d562bbfc0cddc270ac896e388a55350d5","title":"Advanced: HGT Provenance Tracer","description":"Infer donor clades for genomic islands via GC/codon atypicality + k-mer taxonomic assignment (Mash/MinHash). Generate passport stamps per island with donor lineage, confidence, hallmark genes. Genome bar with colored islands; stamp shows donor pie and GC/codon plots. Novelty: High, Pedagogical: High.","notes":"## HORIZONTAL GENE TRANSFER PROVENANCE TRACER

**Full TypeScript Implementation from Roadmap**

### Concept
Create forensic 'passport stamps' for genomic islands identifying donor clades, transfer timing, and functional annotation.

### Mathematical Foundations

**Island Detection via Z-Score:**
```
GC_z(w) = (GC_w - μ_genome) / σ_genome

Flag window if |GC_z| > 2.0
```

**Dinucleotide Relative Abundance:**
```
ρ(XY) = f(XY) / (f(X) × f(Y))
Z_dinuc = Σ|ρ_island(XY) - ρ_genome(XY)| / 16
```

**MinHash Jaccard Similarity:**
```
J(A, B) ≈ |MinHash(A) ∩ MinHash(B)| / |MinHash(A) ∪ MinHash(B)|
Containment: C(A, B) = |MinHash(A) ∩ MinHash(B)| / |MinHash(A)|
```

**Amelioration Time Estimate:**
```
t_amelioration ∝ -ln(|CAI_island - CAI_genome|) / μ_mutation
```

### Complete TypeScript Implementation

- `GenomicIsland` interface (start, end, GC, z-scores, genes, hallmarks)
- `DonorCandidate` with taxon, similarity, confidence, evidence type
- `PassportStamp` with island, donor, amelioration, mechanism
- `HGTAnalysis` full analysis result
- `computeGCContent()`, `computeDinucleotideFrequencies()`
- `computeDinucleotideOddsRatio()`, `dinucleotideZScore()`
- `detectIslands()` sliding window with merge
- `createIsland()` with hallmark gene detection
- `murmurhash3()` hash function
- `computeMinHash()` k-mer sketching
- `jaccardFromMinHash()` similarity calculation
- `inferDonors()` reference database query
- `estimateAmelioration()` recent/intermediate/ancient
- `inferTransferMechanism()` lysogeny/transduction/conjugation
- `analyzeHGTProvenance()` main pipeline
- `renderIslandGenomeBar()` ASCII visualization
- `renderPassportStamp()` detailed stamp view

### TUI Features
- Genome bar with colored islands (by amelioration: recent/intermediate/ancient)
- 'Passport stamp' popup per island showing:
  - Location and GC deviation
  - Top donor with similarity
  - Donor distribution bars
  - GC/codon profile sparkline
  - Hallmark genes
  - Transfer mechanism
  - Amelioration estimate
- Summary: total islands, recent/ancient counts, dominant donors, foreign DNA %
- [←/→] Navigate, [D] Donor details, [P] Phylo tree

### Why It's Good
- Forensic tracing of foreign DNA origins
- Transfer timing estimation via amelioration
- Connects to host range and safety assessment
- 'Passport stamp' metaphor makes analysis accessible

Novelty: 9/10, Pedagogical: 9/10, Wow Factor: 8/10","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-07T00:17:42.024781-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-07T16:53:07.004017-05:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-5jr","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-ojb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-07T00:20:52.376411-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"phage_explorer-5l69","content_hash":"6fd77dba2e69468268bbc023470843f714fb7fbbc005073b0289c4b088c7bd31","title":"Task: Create glossary terms database","description":"Create packages/web/src/education/glossary/terms.ts with 100+ biology terms. Categories: DNA Basics (nucleotide, base pair, strand, etc.), Gene Structure (ORF, promoter, RBS, codon), Translation (ribosome, tRNA, amino acid properties), Phage Biology (capsid, tail, lysogeny, lytic), Evolution (HGT, synteny, homolog), Analysis Methods (GC content, entropy, k-mer). Each term: id, name, shortDef (1 sentence), longDef (paragraph), category, relatedTerms[].","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:43:57.516946-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-10T14:45:40.157973015-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-10T14:45:40.157973015-06:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-5l69","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-0weo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:43:57.519954-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-5l69","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-3zpa","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:43:57.525027-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
